mapper.sql: SELECT t1.id, t5.name AS studentName, t2.name AS courseName, t1.count_lesson_total AS countLessonTotal, t1.count_lesson_complete AS countLessonComplete, (t1.count_lesson_total - t1.count_lesson_complete - IFNULL(t1.count_lesson_refund, 0)) AS countLessonRemaining, CONCAT( '上', IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ls.sign_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM lesson_student ls LEFT JOIN lesson l ON ls.lesson_id = l.id WHERE ls.student_id = t1.student_id AND l.course_id = t1.course_id), 0), ' 假', IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ls.sign_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM lesson_student ls LEFT JOIN lesson l ON ls.lesson_id = l.id WHERE ls.student_id = t1.student_id AND l.course_id = t1.course_id), 0), ' 旷', IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ls.sign_state = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM lesson_student ls LEFT JOIN lesson l ON ls.lesson_id = l.id WHERE ls.student_id = t1.student_id AND l.course_id = t1.course_id), 0), ' 补', IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ls.sign_state = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM lesson_student ls LEFT JOIN lesson l ON ls.lesson_id = l.id WHERE ls.student_id = t1.student_id AND l.course_id = t1.course_id), 0) ) AS attendanceRecord FROM student_course t1 LEFT JOIN course t2 ON t1.course_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN student t5 ON t1.student_id = t5.id
mapper.select:
AND t1.course_id = #{param.courseId}
AND t5.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%')
AND t1.deleted = 0 AND t1.verify_state = 2
ORDER BY t1.id DESC
